text:
good morning fam

group stage is done

playoffs start today, this is where it gets real

Portugal cooked themselves yesterday with that Colombia draw

now they have to play Spain in the Round of 16

brutal reward for one bad result https://t.co/GXKwhbLTYA

good morning fam

last group stage day today

tomorrow the long-awaited World Cup playoffs begin

hopefully we finally get some proper beautiful games https://t.co/a95mQuwbwv

good morning fam

World Cup was drunk again yesterday

nothing made sense, every pick felt cursed

lost almost every Polymarket play and combo I had

another red day in the books https://t.co/wnvzA1Sl0i

good morning fam

finally a normal World Cup day yesterday

no circus, no random pain

just good games and decent Polymarket predicts https://t.co/JhF11X5BIc

good morning fam

yesterday’s England 0-0 vs Ghana was another reminder that this World Cup is not real

maybe I’m wrong, but this feels like one of the weirdest tournaments in the last 20 years

every few games something completely stupid happens https://t.co/aPcyv0vZi9

good morning fam

Messi really saved my ass yesterday

brace vs Austria, Argentina win, and suddenly the day doesn’t look so ugly anymore

after 3 red days in a row I finally closed green thanks to Argentina, France and Norway

needed that one badly https://t.co/QTs1OnK7uN

my Polymarket account got humbled this week

was sitting at 4k+ max PnL, now I’m under 3k

almost 25% down from the top, disgusting little run ngl

but losses are part of the game, otherwise everyone would be rich and annoying

not stopping here

today’s "get it back" play is a Polymarket combo

Argentina -1.5
France -2.5

both passed the eye test in their first games, and right now I still think they’re the two strongest teams in this World Cup

too obvious or free money?

good morning fam

well, no birthday gift for me yesterday

FURIA got smoked 0-3 in the Major final

not exactly how I wanted that day to end https://t.co/m8OrhLjQEb

it’s my birthday today, finally 21

all I need now is FURIA winning the Major final

that would be the perfect gift https://t.co/HWiIWGZ0t7

good morning fam

another crazy World Cup result yesterday

Curacao held Ecuador to 0-0 while Ecuador had like 3 xG

this tournament just refuses to make sense

and today we also have FURIA vs Falcons in the Major final

who are you backing? https://t.co/PvjxBqP6g8

good morning fam

Falcons beating Vitality yesterday was huge for my Major positions

now if Spirit and FURIA both make the final, I’m locked into a good profit no matter who wins https://t.co/OFf4X0Mgn2

good morning fam

a lot of interesting World Cup games today

and Vitality vs Falcons at the Major

definitely not missing that one

happy friday https://t.co/qGDMI7zkDU

good morning fam

Portugal really ruined my combos yesterday

every other match went right, but the Congo draw killed everything

and honestly, Ronaldo playing the full match makes no sense anymore

time for fresh legs https://t.co/vHRWBojXu6

good morning fam

yesterday was finally a proper World Cup day

favorites won by a few goals, like they’re supposed to https://t.co/3YUkpmVdFj

good morning fam

this World Cup has been impossible to read so far

Spain drawing 0-0 with Cape Verde still doesn’t feel real lol https://t.co/ZMvzSJzGdF

good morning fam

another solid green day on Polymarket yesterday

balance is finally back to where it was before the red days

been less active on X lately, mostly focusing on Telegram now

that’s where I post my plays https://t.co/AmXtoN8vYl

good morning fam

yesterday started so well on Polymarket, then the evening ruined everything

CS2 and football went completely wrong, so I closed the day in a small red https://t.co/2GFR8slM5L

good morning fam

closed yesterday in a good plus on Polymarket

World Cup and CS2 plays carried the day

called everything live in my Telegram

happy weekend everyone https://t.co/1E0ngwmkIu

late good morning fam

CS2 now, World Cup later

probably gonna be less active here today

happy friday https://t.co/10lrhMsLAo

stage 3 of the CS2 Major started like cinema

banger matches, crazy swings and somehow almost every button I clicked turned green

days like this remind me why betting on CS is still fun

what match cooked you the most today? https://t.co/jybXFSSq5j
